accessibilityText.message: Controls, live regions, editors, and interactive zones are protected from wrapper mutations by default.

activateForSiteHint.message: Preferences are stored only for this site.

amazonLocalOnlyNote.message: Amazon Ember Display is not redistributed by the extension and is used only when installed locally.

appearanceHelp.message: Persian becomes RTL and English becomes LTR while code, math, and editor zones stay protected.

backupApplied.message: Backup applied. Permissions may need to be granted again.

backupSelected.message: Backup selected. Run validation before applying it.

backupValidated.message: Backup validated. Review the preview before applying.

diagnosticsText.message: Diagnostic export contains codes, counts, and duration buckets, never page text.

directionPolicyNote.message: Persian: right aligned · English: left aligned

englishFontAmazon.message: Local Amazon Ember Display; Inter fallback

extensionDescription.message: Conservative direction and typography correction for mixed Persian and English text.

failureCaptureHeading.message: Report a problem on this page

failureCaptureHelp.message: Create a text-free JSON evidence report for troubleshooting RTLX.

failurePickerStarted.message: Select the element on the page, then reopen RTLX.

failurePrivacyNoText.message: No page text, form values, cookies, or local storage.

failurePrivacyNoUrl.message: No full URL, query string, or fragment.

failureRestrictedHint.message: This is a browser-restricted page. RTLX can export eligibility evidence, but cannot inspect the page DOM.

focusedPrivacyNote.message: Problem reports do not include page text, full URLs, form values, cookies, or screenshots.

helpStepApply.message: Then choose “Fix current tab” or refresh the page so Persian text is aligned and rendered with the configured font.

helpStepGrant.message: On the target page, open RTLX and choose “Always this site” to grant optional access only for that site.

helpStepMode.message: The default mode is Auto-safe. For complex pages, choose “Force only on containers” for that site from the popup.

helpStepRollback.message: If the result is not right, use “Disable and rollback changes”; rollback remains ownership-checked and idempotent.

issuePickerHint.message: Only structural and computed-style evidence is stored. Page text and form values are not recorded.

issuePickerSaved.message: Area evidence saved. Reopen RTLX and download the problem report.

latinFontAmazonLocal.message: Amazon Ember only if installed locally

licensesText.message: Bundled fonts are accepted only with OFL notices and recorded hashes.

localFontNoPermission.message: This version uses Windows fonts through local() and does not request a new permission to enumerate or read font files.

modeHelp.message: Auto-safe applies dir="rtl" only to high-confidence Persian candidates; html and body are never changed.

pageActivationActive.message: Active. If the page is not fixed yet, choose “Fix current tab” or refresh.

pageActivationHint.message: When enabled, the browser asks for this site only, then RTLX applies the page fix.

pageActivationInactive.message: Inactive. RTLX will not change this page.

pageActivationNeedsPermission.message: Enabled, but this site has no persistent permission. Toggle again and grant access.

pageDebugActual.message: Automatic page debug report created from the popup; page text, full URL, form values, cookies, localStorage, network data, and screenshots are not included.

pageDebugExpected.message: Expected: Persian and mixed Persian/English content should become RTL and use the bundled RTLX Mixed Text / Vazirmatn font for Persian glyphs.

permissionNotGranted.message: No persistent permission for this site.

persianFontLocalFirst.message: Use installed Windows fonts first, then Vazirmatn

personalInstallHelp.message: Local-only health, backup, and recovery tools for a permanently sideloaded RTLX installation.

privacyText.message: Text processing is local. Page text, full URLs, form data, and clipboard content are neither transmitted nor persisted.

problemAreaPickerStarted.message: Click the problem area on the page. No rule will be saved.

profileBuilderHelp.message: Profiles are created by the Smart Element Picker. Manual CSS selectors are not required.

quickFixHelp.message: For most sites, grant this site and run the current-tab fix.

remoteProfilesUnavailable.message: Unavailable until an authoritative production endpoint and signing key are provided (insufficient_evidence).

resetSite.message: Clear old settings for this site

resetSiteConfirm.message: Clear old settings and rules for this site?

restoreBackupWarning.message: Import first runs as a dry-run. Permissions, diagnostics, Safe Mode, and operational journals are never restored automatically.

shortcutHelp.message: The browser extension shortcut settings can be used to change this command.

smartPickerHelp.message: Choose a type, then select an element on the page. RTLX creates the selector automatically.

statusHealthy.message: RTLX is active and the main page processing is complete.

statusInactive.message: RTLX is off for this site.

captureRequiresVisibleTab.message: The target tab is hidden or inactive. Return to it, then download the report again.

statusCaptureRequiresVisibleTab.message: Return to the target tab before creating the report.

statusNeedsAttention.message: Processing stopped or hit a serious error; download a problem report.

statusProcessing.message: RTLX is active and is still processing part of the page.

statusStarting.message: RTLX is active and starting page processing.

suspiciousDirection.message: Inherited LTR direction conflicts with high-confidence Persian content.

temporaryDisableSet.message: Paused for this site for 10 minutes.

toggleShortcutDescription.message: Toggle RTLX for the current site

typographyHelp.message: Persian text uses a local Windows font or the bundled Vazirmatn fallback. For Latin text, choose bundled Inter, local Amazon Ember, or preserve the site font.

windowsFontsHelp.message: Without adding a new permission, RTLX first tries installed Windows fonts such as Vazirmatn, Vazir, IRANSans, Segoe UI and Tahoma via CSS local(), then falls back to the bundled font.

statusInvalidContextResponse.message: The extension returned an invalid settings response.

statusResponseContractViolation.message: The background produced an invalid response. Download the debug report.

statusRequestContractViolation.message: The popup request violated the messaging contract before it was sent. Download the debug report.
